payload.answer: Updated: the Brain Slack agent MVP is now implemented, superseding the prior planned/open status for the MVP.

entity_resolution.reason: The new statement refers to the Brain Slack agent MVP, which appears to be the implemented MVP phase of the existing Brain Slack agent project. This updates the prior open/planned status for the MVP without asserting that all possible future Slack agent work is complete.
